headline: Synopsys NASA Deal Puts Simulation Tools To Test In Lunar Missions
summary: Synopsys (NasdaqGS:SNPS) has been selected by NASA to help validate spacesuit compatibility with the lunar environment for upcoming Artemis missions. The company is providing advanced simulation and test technologies to assess risks such as triboelectrification, electrical charging, and communication issues on the moon's surface. The collaboration involves NASA, Synopsys, and EMA working together to support astronaut safety and overall mission reliability. For investors watching Synopsys...

headline: Is Synopsys (SNPS) Quietly Recasting Its Moat Through Lunar Simulation And Embedded Security Tools?
summary: In April 2026, NASA selected Synopsys and EMA to verify Artemis spacesuit compatibility with the lunar environment, while OmniTrust announced a collaboration with Synopsys to bring secure boot validation into virtual ECU development for embedded systems. Together, these projects highlight how Synopsys' simulation, digital engineering, and security tools are being applied to mission-critical aerospace and automotive applications. We’ll now look at how this expanded role in lunar simulation...
